mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE bid_open_time IS NOT NULL AND bid_open_time != '' AND bid_open_time > NOW()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bidding_agency) FROM projects WHERE bidding_agency IS NOT NULL AND bidding_agency != ''

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM projects WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT bidding_agency AS agency, COUNT(*) AS count FROM projects WHERE bidding_agency IS NOT NULL AND bidding_agency != '' GROUP BY bidding_agency ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
